title: Company Names Tribunal decision: The Oracle Events Limited
body: "Application number 5048  Applicant Oracle International Corporation objected to the name used by The Oracle Events Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 24 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of The Oracle Events Limited is changed to 15563975, LTD. "
